_pre_countdown_delay_comment: Silent live-view seconds before every visible countdown.
_countdown_seconds_comment: Visible countdown before capture. 3 means show 3, 2, 1.
_countdown_sound_seconds_comment: How many last countdown ticks play sound. 0 disables countdown beeps.
_done_screen_seconds_comment: Seconds to keep the final/done screen before returning to idle.
